scripts.db:auth:migrate:local: wrangler d1 execute DB --config dist/server/wrangler.json --local --persist-to .wrangler/state --file drizzle/0002_auth_and_family_scope.sql
scripts.db:shared-child:migrate:local: wrangler d1 execute DB --config dist/server/wrangler.json --local --persist-to .wrangler/state --file drizzle/0004_shared_child_accounts.sql
